narrative_text: Deep in the Whispering Woods, a brave little fox named Pip has found a mysterious, glowing map stuck to an ancient, mossy tree. What do you think the map shows, and where will Pip go first?
branch_summary: A curious fox discovers a glowing map on a giant ancient tree.
scene_description: A lush, enchanted forest at twilight. Dappled purple and indigo shadows stretch across the forest floor, illuminated by floating golden fireflies. A massive, gnarled oak tree dominates the center-right, its bark shimmering with bioluminescent moss. The atmosphere is hushed and magical, with a color palette of deep teals, glowing ambers, and soft violets.

properties.color: bright burnt orange with a snowy white chest and tail tip
properties.size: small and nimble, about the height of a low bush
properties.texture: thick, velvety fur that looks soft to the touch
properties.pattern: solid orange with black 'stockings' on its four paws
properties.distinctive_features: large, expressive amber eyes and extra-long pointed ears with dark tufts

entities.pose: standing on hind legs with front paws resting against the tree trunk, head tilted up

properties.color: weathered charcoal grey bark with patches of neon lime moss
properties.size: massive, towering above the rest of the scene
properties.texture: rough, deeply ridged bark with twisty, reaching branches
properties.pattern: swirling knots in the wood that look like hidden faces
properties.distinctive_features: a hollow knot in the center that glows with a faint internal light

entities.pose: sturdy and upright with branches arching over the top of the frame

properties.color: pale parchment yellow with shimmering gold ink
properties.size: small, roughly the size of the fox's head
properties.texture: crinkled, ancient paper with tattered edges
properties.pattern: complex web of dotted lines and tiny sparkling stars
properties.distinctive_features: the map pulses with a soft blue light and is stuck to the tree by a silver pin

entities.pose: pinned flat against the rough bark, fluttering slightly in the breeze

properties.color: vibrant magenta caps with glowing cream spots
properties.texture: rubbery and smooth with a slight damp sheen
properties.distinctive_features: a cluster of three mushrooms that cast a small circle of pink light on the ground

entities.pose: sprouting upward from the gnarled roots of the oak

error_exclusions.reason: The tree is a static environment element.
There is only one map, which is a unique quest item.
